title: Safari CRM
description: A system that eliminated operational chaos for growing travel businesses.
problem: Travel operators struggled with fragmented tools, manual workflows, and poor scalability.
solution: We designed a centralized system that automates operations and improves efficiency.

title: Nexus POS
description: A cloud-native point of sale system for multi-location retail chains.
impact: Integrated loyalty program boosting retention by 25%
problem: Retailers faced inventory lag and slow checkout processes with legacy systems.
solution: A high-performance POS with offline capabilities and real-time cloud synchronization.

title: Flow Automation
description: Enterprise-grade workflow automation for financial reporting.
problem: Finance teams were manually reconciling thousands of transactions, leading to errors and delays.
solution: An automated pipeline that ingests, validates, and reports financial data with 99.9% accuracy.
